tasks.label: Upload UF2 (RPI-RP2 fallback)
args: $d=(Get-Volume | Where-Object { $_.FileSystemLabel -eq "RPI-RP2" } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty DriveLetter); if(-not $d){ throw "RPI-RP2 drive not found. Put board in BOOTSEL mode first." }; $dest = "$d`:\"; Copy-Item ".pio/build/kb2040/firmware.uf2" $dest -Force; Write-Output "Copied firmware.uf2 to $dest"
